name: Silva Zoldyck
description: Silva is Killua's father. He is a silent, pensive figure, and Killua seems to rarely interact with him, although Killua does look up to him. He allows Killua to go along with Gon on their journey, but this is only so Killua would gain more experience when thrown out into the real world on his own. In fact, Silva was confident that Killua would eventually return home on his own, as an assassin.

name: Sayo Hikawa
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3") Sayo is a third year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the guitarist of Roselia. She is the older, more serious twin of Hina. Sayo sees being the eldest twin as more of a burden than anything. name: Captain Harlock
nativeName: キャプテン・ハーロック
description: __Status:__ Captain of the Arcadia, Former Captain of the Death Shadow Harlock is the archetypical romantic hero, a space pirate with an individualist philosophy of life. He is as noble as he is taciturn, rebellious, stoically fighting against totalitarian regimes, whether they be earth-born or alien. In his own words, he "fights for no one's sake... only for something deep in his heart". (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Masafumi Akagi
description: He is a straightforward dominant boy and is the student council president. He is in class 3-8. ~!He starts dating Ryouko Kaji because he fears that she would be willing to do it with any man if they asked. He also thinks she's cute.!~

name: Tatara Fujita
description: A third year middle school student living a quiet boring life and getting bullied by the upperclassmen. He then meets Kaname Sengoku and gets dragged into trying ballroom dancing. He soon fall in love with ballroom dancing after watching a video of Kaname Sengoku at a tournament and winning it. He aspires to become a professional ballroom dancer.

description: The master of the Tenjin-ya Inn and an ogre god. Despite his cold attitude, hee is highly respected by his subordinates due to the kindness he has shown them.
